name: paddle
description: Access Paddle Billing products, prices, customers, transactions, and subscriptions

envVars.name: PADDLE_API_KEY
envVars.description: Paddle API key (pdl_live_apikey_... for live, pdl_sdbx_apikey_... for sandbox)

tools.name: List Products
tools.description: List products in the Paddle catalog, optionally including their prices

status.description: Filter by status: active or archived

include.description: Related entities to include, e.g. prices

after.description: Pagination cursor: return entities after this Paddle ID

tools.name: List Prices
tools.description: List prices for Paddle products to find price IDs for checkouts and subscriptions

product_id.description: Comma-separated Paddle product IDs (pro_...) to filter by

status.description: Filter by status: active or archived

after.description: Pagination cursor: return entities after this Paddle ID

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: List or search Paddle customers to find customer IDs and contact details

search.description: Search customers by name or email

status.description: Filter by status: active or archived

after.description: Pagination cursor: return entities after this Paddle ID

tools.name: List Transactions
tools.description: List Paddle transactions for revenue review, filtered by status, customer, or subscription

status.description: Comma-separated statuses to filter by: draft, ready, billed, paid, completed, canceled, past_due

customer_id.description: Comma-separated Paddle customer IDs (ctm_...) to filter by

subscription_id.description: Comma-separated Paddle subscription IDs (sub_...) to filter by

order_by.description: Sort expression such as billed_at[DESC] or created_at[ASC]; default id[DESC]

after.description: Pagination cursor: return entities after this Paddle ID

tools.name: List Subscriptions
tools.description: List Paddle subscriptions to review recurring revenue, statuses, and renewal dates

customer_id.description: Comma-separated Paddle customer IDs (ctm_...) to filter by

status.description: Comma-separated statuses to filter by: active, canceled, past_due, paused, trialing

price_id.description: Comma-separated Paddle price IDs (pri_...) to filter by

after.description: Pagination cursor: return entities after this Paddle ID

tools.name: Get Subscription
tools.description: Retrieve a single Paddle subscription with its items, status, and billing dates

include.description: Comma-separated related previews to include: next_transaction, recurring_transaction_details

tools.name: Create Customer
tools.description: Create a new Paddle customer, e.g. before creating transactions or subscriptions for a new buyer

email.description: Email address of the customer (1-320 characters)

locale.description: IETF BCP 47 locale tag, e.g. en or de (defaults to en)

custom_data.description: Arbitrary key-value data stored with the customer

tools.name: Create Price
tools.description: Create a price for a Paddle product so it can be used in checkouts, transactions, and subscriptions

product_id.description: Paddle product ID (pro_...) this price is for

description.description: Internal description for this price, not shown to customers (2-500 characters)

unit_price.description: Price object with amount as a string in the lowest denomination and currency_code, e.g. {"amount": "1000", "currency_code": "USD"} for $10

billing_cycle.description: For recurring prices: interval (day, week, month, year) and frequency, e.g. {"interval": "month", "frequency": 1}; omit for one-time prices

trial_period.description: Trial period with interval and frequency (requires billing_cycle)

name.description: Name shown to customers at checkout and on invoices (1-150 characters)

quantity.description: Purchase quantity limits, e.g. {"minimum": 1, "maximum": 100} (the default when omitted)

tools.name: Create Product
tools.description: Create a new product in the Paddle catalog

tax_category.description: Tax category used to charge the correct tax rate, e.g. standard, saas, digital-goods, ebooks, implementation-services, professional-services, software-programming-services, training-services, website-hosting

image_url.description: HTTPS URL of an image shown at checkout

custom_data.description: Arbitrary key-value data stored with the product

prompts.title: Revenue overview
prompts.prompt: List my recent completed Paddle transactions and summarize revenue by product.

prompts.title: Subscription status
prompts.prompt: Show me my active Paddle subscriptions and flag any that are past due or canceled.

prompts.title: Catalog overview
prompts.prompt: List my Paddle products with their prices and summarize the current catalog.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Paddle setup

steps.title: Create a Paddle account
steps.description: Sign up for a free sandbox account at https://sandbox-login.paddle.com/signup to test against simulated data, or use your live account at https://login.paddle.com.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: In the Paddle dashboard, go to Paddle > Developer tools > Authentication, open the API keys tab, and select New API key. Name it, assign the permissions you need (e.g. read for products, prices, customers, transactions, subscriptions; write for products), and set an expiry (default 90 days, maximum 1 year). The key is shown only once - store it securely.

steps.title: Configure the environment variable
steps.description: Set PADDLE_API_KEY to your key. Sandbox keys start with pdl_sdbx_apikey_ and live keys with pdl_live_apikey_.

notes: Sandbox uses a separate host: replace api.paddle.com with sandbox-api.paddle.com when working with a sandbox key. Keys are environment-specific and do not work across environments.
List endpoints return a data array plus meta pagination info; follow meta.pagination.next or pass the last ID as the after cursor.
Transactions are capped at 30 results per page; other entities support larger pages.
API keys expire (maximum 1 year), so rotate them before expiry to avoid outages.
